creator: radicleparticles@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jim D. from comment #7)

Looking through the extensive degug files I can see where the GNOMETERMINAL option is initially "on" but later changed to "off" and MATETERMINAL is changed from "off" to "on".

"/var/db/ports/security_secpanel/options" now has "MATETERMINAL" SET and GNOMETERMINAL UNSET.

I don't know what happened - maybe I failed to completely remove something. At any rate, repeated deinstall/reinstall now shows the desired terminal selection. Maybe I moved the cursor to "MATE-Terminal" but failed to activate the option. I don't know. Sorry about the unnecessary chatter.
